title: A Portable Device for Lab-Free, Versatile Nucleic Acid Extraction - Protocol
author: Anthony J Politza

steps_raw.instruction: Label a 1.5 mL tube and add each Sample . The following reagent volumes and steps are assuming a 50 µl starting sample. If you need to process more than 50 µl, increase the lysis buffer and ethanol proportionally to your new sample volume (550 µl : 50 µl). A maximum of 750 µl will fit into the top of the mini-column, therefore if you increase sample volume you will need to add additional repetitions of the RNA/DNA binding steps. **Please see the manufacturer's manual for additional details.**
Add 550 µL, Lysis buffer to the Sample Mix well by vortexing or pipetting. Incubate for 00:10:00 at Room temperature 600 µL, DNA Lysate
Add 550 µL, Ethanol (95%) to the 600 µL, DNA Lysate 1150 µL, DNA Lysate

Setup the following reaction: Component (Stock Concentration) Volume PCR Master Mix (4X) 6.25 µL Forward primer (10 µM) 1.50 µL Reverse primer (10 µM) 1.50 µL RNA Sample (variable) 10 µL Nuclease Free Water 5.50 µL Total 25 µL
Mix well and pipette 750 µL, DNA Lysate / 1150µl into the top of the QIAamp Mini Spin Column.
Wait 00:01:00 for the liquid to spin down.
Turn on the power switch located on the rear of the device.

A bright red LED should illuminate on the front of the device, indicating the device is ready to be used. Our device is pre-programmed to manage the spin down steps and automatically adjust the timings depending on the appropriate step. Example: Step 1. 60s Step 2. 60s etc. **At this time the use of other devices is not recommended or tested with this protocol. We imagine mini-centrifuges operating on external battery power could work as an alternative if they maintain higher than 1750g while spinning. (Can check with equation listed below)**
Repeat Steps 7 -> 12.
Add 500 µL, Buffer AW1 to the top of QIAamp Mini Spin Column.
Place the entire QIAamp Mini Spin Column & tube into the portable centrifuge.

Close the lid of the device, check the red LED is illuminated, and push the front button beside the LED. If the red LED is not illuminated check that Step 4 was completed, and that the device was charged overnight.
Place the entire QIAamp Mini Spin Column & tube into the portable centrifuge.
Close the lid of the device, check the red LED is illuminated, and push the front button beside the LED.
Wait 00:01:00 for the liquid to spin down.
Add 500 µL, Buffer AW2 to the top of QIAamp Mini Spin Column.
Place the entire QIAamp Mini Spin Column & tube into the portable centrifuge.
Close the lid of the device, check the red LED is illuminated, and push the front button beside the LED.
Wait 00:01:00 for the liquid to spin down.
Remove the QIAamp Mini Spin Column & discard the waste tube.
Add 500 µL, Ethanol (95%) to the top of QIAamp Mini Spin Column.
Place the entire QIAamp Mini Spin Column & tube into the portable centrifuge.
Close the lid of the device, check the red LED is illuminated, and push the front button beside the LED.
Wait 00:03:00 for the liquid to spin down.

Add 80 µL, Nuclease Free Water to the top of QIAamp Mini Spin Column. Be sure to drop liquid into the center of the column membrane. In this protocol we used Nuclease Free Water to elute our samples for highest compatibility with downstream PCR. For other applications replace with Buffer AVE. In this protocol we used 80 µl Nuclease Free Water to elute our samples. For other applications this volume could be adjusted. For highest yield a two-stage elution with 1/2 and 2/2 elution volume can be used, but was not tested in this protocol. Please see the Qiagen Viral RNA Mini Kit manual for more details when designing for your specific application.
Place the entire QIAamp Mini Spin Column & tube into the portable centrifuge.
Close the lid of the device, check the red LED is illuminated, and push the front button beside the LED.
Wait 00:01:00 for the liquid to spin down.
Collect the labeled 1.5 mL tube. The 1.5 mL tube now contains ~50-60 µl of RNA sample in Nuclease Free Water. Please store appropriately (or move immediately to downstream testing.
Incubate 00:01:00 at Room temperature
Insert the Mini Column into a fresh 1.5 mL tube and label accordingly.
Insert the QIAamp Mini Spin Column into a fresh collection tube.
Remove the QIAamp Mini Spin Column & discard the waste tube.
Insert the QIAamp Mini Spin Column into a fresh collection tube.
Remove the QIAamp Mini Spin Column & discard the waste tube.
Insert the QIAamp Mini Spin Column into a fresh collection tube.
Remove the QIAamp Mini Spin Column & discard the waste tube.
Discard the QIAamp Mini Spin Column.

Thaw at Room temperature and place on ice: PCR Master Mix PCR primers Water RNA Sample The PCR Mix used in this protocol: Applied Biosystems™ TaqMan™ Fast Virus 1-Step Master Mix for qPCR Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #44-444-32 Primers were purchased from Integrated DNA Technologies (IDT).

Set-up the following program on the thermal cycler: Step Temperature Time Cycles Reverse Transcription 55 °C 00:05:00 1 Heat Activation 95 °C 00:00:20 2 1 Denaturation 95 °C 00:00:03 45-60 Annealing & Extension 60 °C 00:00:30 45-60 Hold 4 °C
Gather QIAamp Viral RNA Mini Kit Qiagen Catalog #52904
